subject: Arm
sought: a single defensible market capitalisation for Arm
found_instead: the trackers disagree by roughly 20 percent, $320B to $383B. One figure was picked and the range noted in the row, but the row still presents a point value at source_tier 1.
blocks: any comparison that leans on Arm's market cap carries an unstated 20 percent band
would_close_it: a filed share count plus a dated closing price, the method used for 04's rows, which reduces the tracker to price only

subject: SK hynix
sought: a single defensible market capitalisation for SK hynix
searched: SK hynix SEC Form F-1, filed ahead of its Jul 2026 Nasdaq listing (the source of every other figure in the row); the market-cap trackers cited in the row note, retrieved 2026-07-13
found_instead: the F-1 gives audited figures but no post-listing market cap; the trackers span $877B to $1.07T, a 22 percent spread, most likely a stale pre-listing baseline colliding with post-listing prices days after the Nasdaq debut.
blocks: SK hynix is a chokepoint on both 01 and 04; a fifth of its market cap is unresolved
would_close_it: the post-listing share count from SK hynix's own F-1 or 20-F, multiplied by a dated close

subject: Taiyo Yuden
sought: the document behind Taiyo Yuden's FY2026 figures
searched: the row's own cited PDF at taiyo-hd.co.jp, refetched 2026-07-21 (58,296 chars); the four figures in the row's note searched against it
found_instead: THE CITED DOCUMENT IS A DIFFERENT COMPANY. It states 'Company name: TAIYO HOLDINGS CO., LTD.' and 'Stock code: 4626'. Taiyo Yuden is 6976, which is the ticker on this row. Taiyo Holdings reports net sales of JPY137,851M for the year ended 2026-03-31; this row claims JPY355,341M, and NONE of its four figures (355,341 / 14,806 / 14,474 / 41,063) appear anywhere in the cited PDF.
blocks: a tier-1 row in the flagship map cites a document that does not support it. The figures are plausibly genuine Taiyo Yuden numbers sourced elsewhere, but as cited they are unverifiable, and check_identity.py cannot catch this because it only guards EDGAR CIKs
would_close_it: Taiyo Yuden Co Ltd's own FY2026 consolidated results from its IR site (ticker 6976), which would either confirm these four figures or replace them

subject: TDK

searched: the row's cited PDF at tdk.com, refetched 2026-07-21 under both the project user agent and a browser user agent
found_instead: HTTP 403 Forbidden to both. The host refuses automated clients outright, so the citation cannot be machine-verified from here.
blocks: nothing about the figures, but the citation cannot be checked by tooling and must be taken on trust
